value.title: Is Alphabet the Best "Magnificent Seven" AI Stock?
value.summary: One member of the group is doing something none of the others can match -- and the stock still doesn't trade like it.

value.title: Nothing Seems to Be Going Right for Meta Platforms. How to Play META Stock Here.
value.summary: Meta Platforms is in the red this year and is the second-worst-performing Magnificent 7 stock so far. Here are the key challenges that the company is facing.

value.title: Tesla Has Only 69 Robotaxis In Texas — But They Are Cheap
value.summary: Tesla Inc. is getting lapped in the Texas robotaxi race. The question is whether it matters. Texas Department of Motor Vehicles data as of June 16 puts Tesla’s statewide fleet at just 69 vehicles, according to research from Bank of America. Waymo leads with 620, AVRide has 317, Nuro and Zoox round out the field at 47 and 35. Tesla is also trails its competitors in markets.
